title: corosync bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.1.9-2]
- Resolves: RHEL-96073

- exec: Add support for env STATE_DIRECTORY
- init: Use LogsDirectory in systemd unit file

[3.1.9-1.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-84612

- totemsrp: Check size of orf_token msg (fixes CVE-2025-30472)
full_text:
[3.1.9-2]
- Resolves: RHEL-96073

- exec: Add support for env STATE_DIRECTORY
- init: Use LogsDirectory in systemd unit file

[3.1.9-1.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-84612

- totemsrp: Check size of orf_token msg (fixes CVE-2025-30472)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20442-0.html
